title: Set Up Your Intel Feeds
problemStatement:
As an analyst, you need to know where to look for answers quickly.

Create a new **Bookmark Folder** in your browser called **'SOC Toolkit'**.

Add the following essential links to it:
1.  **VirusTotal:** [https://www.virustotal.com](https://www.virustotal.com) (For checking IPs, Domains, Hashes)
2.  **AbuseIPDB:** [https://www.abuseipdb.com](https://www.abuseipdb.com) (For checking IP reputation)
3.  **URLScan.io:** [https://urlscan.io](https://urlscan.io) (For safely viewing a website without visiting it)
4.  **MITRE ATT&CK:** [https://attack.mitre.org](https://attack.mitre.org) (The encyclopedia of adversary tactics)

### Question
Why is it safer to use **URLScan.io** to view a suspicious link rather than opening it in a normal browser tab?
hints: URLScan uses a 'headless browser' on a remote server. Your computer never touches the malicious code.
expectedOutput: Confirmation that the bookmarks are saved. Answer: 'URLScan.io renders the page on a remote server, protecting my local machine from any drive-by downloads or malicious scripts on the suspicious site.'
